title: 高定时尚杂志封面
description:
案例「高定时尚杂志封面」属于海报/封面。这是一张海报/封面类案例，重点在主视觉、标题、情绪、构图和传播冲击力。适合改成活动海报、电影海报、专辑封面、产品发布海报、小红书封面或宣传 KV。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：Ultra high-fashion magazine cover, Louis Vuitton-风格 editorial. Close-up 肖像 of a confident woman with soft rose-gold hair and natural airy bangs, s光线ly wind-blown for movement. She is wearing a luxury summer outfit: a structured 光线weight linen or silk jacket in warm golden-yellow tones, layered over a modest high-neck top, paired with a bold gold choker necklace and subtle statement earrings. Fabric flows naturally with a summer breeze, s光线ly textured and breathable, capturing a premium seasonal feel. Styling is elegant, modest, and refined — no revealing clothing. 光线ing is high-end studio mixed with natural golden hour glow: warm high光线s, soft shadows, luminous skin with glossy editorial finish. 背景 is a rich summer gradient (sunset gold fading into soft coral or warm beige), 干净 but visually striking. Composition is dynamic and s光线ly 电影感: hair in motion, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on face. 字体排版: large elegant serif masthead "Louis Vuitton" at the top, bold cover line "YOUR CHOI
prompt_raw:
Ultra high-fashion magazine cover, Louis Vuitton-style editorial. Close-up portrait of a confident woman with soft rose-gold hair and natural airy bangs, slightly wind-blown for movement. She is wearing a luxury summer outfit: a structured lightweight linen or silk jacket in warm golden-yellow tones, layered over a modest high-neck top, paired with a bold gold choker necklace and subtle statement earrings.

Fabric flows naturally with a summer breeze, slightly textured and breathable, capturing a premium seasonal feel. Styling is elegant, modest, and refined — no revealing clothing.

Lighting is high-end studio mixed with natural golden hour glow: warm highlights, soft shadows, luminous skin with glossy editorial finish.

Background is a rich summer gradient (sunset gold fading into soft coral or warm beige), clean but visually striking.

Composition is dynamic and slightly cinematic: hair in motion, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on face.

Typography: large elegant serif masthead "Louis Vuitton" at the top, bold cover line "YOUR CHOICE ENDS HERE" in premium editorial layout, minimal supporting text.

Ultra-realistic, hyper-detailed skin texture, 8K resolution, sharp focus, glossy magazine print quality, cinematic color grading, luxury fashion photography, no nudity, tasteful and editorial.

prompt_template_cn:
制作一张【主题】的【海报/封面类型】。

主视觉：
画面中心是【主视觉对象】，呈现【动作/状态/姿态】，具有强烈视觉吸引力。

标题文字：
主标题写【主标题】，副标题写【副标题】。文字位置为【文字位置】，字体风格为【字体风格】，要求清晰可读。

画面风格：
整体采用【视觉风格】，氛围为【情绪氛围】，主色调为【主色调】，光影为【光影效果】。

背景与元素：
背景包含【背景元素】，辅助元素包括【装饰元素/符号/纹理】，但不要抢夺主视觉。

构图要求：
采用【构图方式】，层次明确，适合远看抓眼、近看有细节。

输出要求：
画面比例为【画面比例】，适合用于【发布平台/使用场景】。
